name: Accenture plc
lede: Accenture runs 23 capability centers across thirteen Indian cities. Mumbai, Bengaluru, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Chennai, Gandhinagar, Noida, Coimbatore, Kolkata, Pune, Bhubaneswar, Indore and Jaipur, covering CoE, gbs, it, R&D and sales & marketing, built over 36 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Accenture office in India. We map 23, across thirteen cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Accenture plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Accenture runs 23 verified GCC centers across 13 Indian cities (Mumbai, Bengaluru, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Chennai, Gandhinagar, Noida, Coimbatore, Kolkata, Pune, Bhubaneswar, Indore, Jaipur), covering CoE, gbs, it, R&D and sales & marketing. bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 825 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Accenture operate in India?
faq.a: Accenture operates 23 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Accenture have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Accenture's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai, Bengaluru, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Chennai, Gandhinagar, Noida, Coimbatore, Kolkata, Pune, Bhubaneswar, Indore and Jaipur.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Accenture run in India?
faq.a: Accenture runs CoE, gbs, it, R&D and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Accenture's India GCCs?
faq.a: Accenture's India centers employ in the >10K range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Accenture's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 825 leaders at Accenture's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
